arts.ttl: Tottenham’s Guglielmo Vicario undergoes ankle surgery after Injury against Man City
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur’s goalkeeper, Guglielmo Vicario, has undergone surgery following a fractured ankle sustained during the team’s 4-0 victory over Manchester City. Despite the injury, Vicario impressively completed the entire match at the Etihad Stadium on Saturday. The 28-year-old Italian required medical attention late in the first half but returned to the field limping after halftime. Remarkably, he managed to make three crucial saves in the second half. On Monday evening, Tottenham confirmed in a statement that Vicario had surgery for the fracture and would be evaluated by the club’s medical staff to determine his return to training.
